defs: to lean forward, resting one's upper body (on a desktop etc)
(coll.) (of a hen) to sit in the nest to lay or hatch eggs
(fig.) (of a person) to be laid up from illness or exhaustion
(fig.) (of a machine, vehicle etc) to break down; to be out of commission
(Tw) to wander about; to roam around freely (from Taiwanese 拋拋走, Tai-lo pr. [pha-pha-tsáu])
